goal.text:
Add a 'forgot password' flow to the web app and make sure it works end-to-end.

While you're at it, clean up stale password-reset tokens that are older than 30 days — they should never have been retained that long.
constraints: No production deploys without explicit approval.
The forgot-password change must have automated test coverage before it merges.

tasks.description: Implement the forgot-password endpoint + UI on a feature branch feat/forgot-password. Include unit tests for the new code paths. Do NOT push to main.
tasks.successCriteria: Branch builds; new unit tests pass; PR drafted (not published).
tasks.recoverabilityPlan: Discard the feature branch; nothing merged.

tasks.description: Review the diff produced by task_impl-reset-flow against its success criteria. Run linters. Surface any blocking issues.
tasks.successCriteria: No Blocking review items; lint clean.

tasks.description: Run the auth E2E suite plus a new 'forgot-password' E2E test against the feature branch at localhost.
tasks.successCriteria: All auth-suite tests pass AND the new forgot-password E2E test passes.

tasks.description: Take a verified snapshot of password_resets in production BEFORE any cleanup. Verify the snapshot is restorable by restoring it onto staging and confirming row counts match.
tasks.successCriteria: Snapshot id recorded in artifacts/snapshot-id.txt AND restore verified on staging with matching row count.
tasks.recoverabilityPlan: Snapshots themselves are inert; no rollback needed.

tasks.description: Delete rows from production.password_resets where created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'. MUST include the WHERE predicate. Requires the snapshot from task_snapshot-prod-tokens to be verified before this task may emit its action proposal.
tasks.successCriteria: After the delete, COUNT(*) WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' === 0 AND no rows newer than 30 days are affected (verified by comparing pre/post counts in the >=30d-old segment to the dry-run count).
tasks.recoverabilityPlan: Restore from snapshot id recorded by task_snapshot-prod-tokens (verified restorable on staging).

approvalHistory.comment: see v1 — needed snapshot + T4 + tighter WHERE.
Approved. Snapshot task added; purge re-tiered to T4 with explicit WHERE predicate in the success criteria; recoverability plan references the snapshot id.
